name: IdsEdwSvcDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT SVC.SVC_SK, SVC.SVC_ID, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(COALESCE(CD1.TRGT_CD, 'UNK')) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE COALESCE(CD1.TRGT_CD, 'UNK') END AS SRC_SYS_CD, SVC.SVC_TYP_CD_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(COALESCE(CD2.TRGT_CD, 'UNK')) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE COALESCE(CD2.TRGT_CD, 'UNK') END AS SVC_TYP_CD, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(COALESCE(CD2.TRGT_CD_NM, 'UNK')) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE COALESCE(CD2.TRGT_CD_NM, 'UNK') END AS SVC_TYP_NM, SVC.VBB_IN, SVC.SVC_DESC, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.SVC AS SVC LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG AS CD1 ON SVC.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD1.CD_MPPNG_SK LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG AS CD2 ON SVC.SVC_TYP_CD_SK = CD2.CD_MPPNG_SK) SELECT SVC_SK, SVC_ID, SRC_SYS_CD, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, SVC_TYP_CD, SVC_TYP_NM, VBB_IN, SVC_DESC, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, SVC_TYP_CD_SK FROM cte

Write SVC Data into a Sequential file for Load Job IdsEdwSvcDLoad.

Job Name: IdsEdwSvcDExtr
